message:
fix(ffs-core): fix validate_btrfs_skip_validation test (bd-kdvqz)

The test was failing because:
1. Setting nodesize to 128K broke tree walking alignment checks
2. Tree block checksums were not being stamped

Fixes:
- Change test to set invalid sectorsize (256) instead of nodesize
- Add tree block CRC32C stamping to build_btrfs_image()
- Update test to accept NotFound (missing root item) as valid
  outcome since we're proving validation was bypassed

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
